11.response: {"Q0":"Concentration, and reaction to fast paced decision making."}

0.response: {"Q0":"If i got a lot of gems in a row, i'd stop digging in case it's a rock. And with the meteors, i'd get all the gems, and half of the green rocks in case there's some more gems in there."}

9.response: {"Q0":"felt more focused on the galaxy part because it was varying whether it was A or S. Planets had the same sequence no matter what so it was muscle memory for the planets at some point."}

2.response: {"Q0":"It felt like 40% of the time it was a rock"}

8.response: {"Q0":"whichever was safer I'd generally choose, unless they're around the same, i'd choose the higher."}
